verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_7: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur.
verse.verse_8: Of it there is no preventer.
verse.verse_9: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion
verse.verse_10: And the mountains will pass on, departing -
verse.verse_11: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,
verse.verse_12: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.
verse.verse_13: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],
verse.verse_14: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.
verse.verse_15: Then is this magic, or do you not see?
verse.verse_16: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."
verse.verse_17: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure,
verse.verse_18: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.
verse.verse_19: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
verse.verse_20: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
verse.verse_21: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.
verse.verse_22: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire.
verse.verse_23: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.
verse.verse_24: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.
verse.verse_25: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.
verse.verse_26: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allah].
verse.verse_27: So Allah conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.
verse.verse_28: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."
verse.verse_29: So remind [O Muhammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.
verse.verse_30: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time?"
verse.verse_31: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."
verse.verse_32: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?
verse.verse_33: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.
verse.verse_34: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.
verse.verse_35: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?
verse.verse_36: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.
verse.verse_37: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?
verse.verse_38: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority.
verse.verse_39: Or has He daughters while you have sons?
verse.verse_40: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
verse.verse_41: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
verse.verse_42: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan.
verse.verse_43: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.
verse.verse_44: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."
verse.verse_45: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -
verse.verse_46: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.
verse.verse_47: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know.
verse.verse_48: And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord when you arise.
verse.verse_49: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars.
